/usr/bin/ar qc libpmx-driver-stub.a CMakeFiles/pmx-driver-stub.dir/src/driver-simu/LedDriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmx-driver-stub.dir/src/driver-simu/LcdShieldDriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmx-driver-stub.dir/src/driver-simu/ButtonDriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmx-driver-stub.dir/src/driver-simu/SwitchDriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmx-driver-stub.dir/src/driver-simu/SensorsDriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmx-driver-stub.dir/src/driver-simu/ServoDriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmx-driver-stub.dir/src/driver-simu/AsservDriver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmx-driver-stub.dir/src/driver-simu/ColorDriver.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libpmx-driver-stub.a
